# ZOLA Property Management

> Ontario's trusted property management and tenant placement company. We help GTA landlords rent their properties to AAA tenants in 14 days on average — with no upfront fees and a 6-month tenant guarantee.

## Company
- Name: ZOLA Property Management
- Website: https://www.zolapropertymanagement.com
- Phone: 437-448-6162
- Email: info@zolapropertymanagement.com
- Service area: Greater Toronto Area and surrounding Ontario (Toronto, North York, Scarborough, Etobicoke, Markham, Vaughan, Brampton, Mississauga, Oakville, Burlington, Milton, Ajax, Pickering, Whitby, Oshawa, Barrie, and more)
- Years in business: 10+
- Properties leased: 100+
- Average days to rent: 14 (vs. 30–45 GTA market average)
- Insurance: $1M E&O
- Tenant screening: Powered by SingleKey (7-point screen)
- Google rating: 5.0

## Services
- Tenant Placement (one-time fee, paid only after the lease is signed)
- Full-Service Property Management (monthly percentage of rent)
- Both include AAA tenant screening, marketing on Kijiji / Facebook Marketplace / Realtor.ca, all showings, Ontario standard lease prep, and our 6-month tenant replacement guarantee.

## Property types managed
Condos, basement apartments, detached homes, semi-detached homes, townhouses, multi-unit properties.

## Common questions
- How fast can ZOLA rent my property? Typically 14 days, much faster than the GTA market average of 30–45 days.
- Do landlords pay upfront? No. You pay nothing until the tenant signs the lease.
- Does ZOLA work with overseas/out-of-province landlords? Yes — a large portion of clients live abroad.
- Are weekend showings available? Yes, 7 days a week.
- What happens if a tenant breaks the lease early? Within the first 6 months we replace the tenant at no extra cost.
